issue_title: fix(serial): WebSerial port not closed on page refresh, requiring USB replug
issue_body:
## Problem

When connected to a flight controller and the browser page is refreshed (F5 / Ctrl+R) or the tab is closed, the WebSerial port is not closed gracefully. The serial reader/writer locks remain held, leaving the FC in a state where it cannot be reconnected without physically unplugging and replugging the USB cable.

## Root Cause

`serial_backend.js` has no `pagehide` (or equivalent) listener. On page unload, the JavaScript context is destroyed without closing the port, so the FC sees an abrupt USB CDC disconnect rather than a clean close.

## Expected Behavior

After refreshing the page, the configurator should be able to reconnect to the FC without a USB replug.

## Affected

- All non-CLI tabs when connected via WebSerial (USB)
